description_long: This banner object features a long, rectangular red base with a series of evenly spaced vertical black elements arranged in rows along its length. The base appears to be made of a rigid material, possibly metal or plastic, and is detailed with small metallic fasteners and connectors. At both shorter ends, there are gold-colored pin-like structures, suggesting electrical or modular connectivity. The black vertical elements resemble posts or supports, possibly for holding signage or electronic components. The surface of the base is smooth and glossy, with visible circuit-like patterns etched or printed onto it. The overall design is technical and modular, suitable for structured urban installations or event displays.
description: A long, red rectangular banner with rows of black vertical posts and gold pin connectors on each end, featuring a smooth, glossy surface with technical detailing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of the red base with two rows of black vertical posts and gold connectors at both ends.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the narrow width, the height of the black posts, and the alignment of gold connectors at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the rows of black posts and gold connectors, with technical surface details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the length, the arrangement of posts, and the gold connectors at the near end.
